'''Demophon''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]], the primary planet of the [[Demophon system/Legends|Demophon system]]. The planet had two continents, [[Junno]] and [[Klis]], which were surrounded by a vast [[Ocean/Legends|ocean]]. It was named for [[Alres Demophon]], one of the founders of the [[Republic Scout Service/Legends|Republic Scout Service]].

==Description==
Demophon was a heavily industrialized world, containing many industrial complexes due to the abundance of uncommon resources. Prior to its ultimate [[Demophon supernova|destruction]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Demophon's [[Demophon (star)|sun]] was unstable and approaching [[Supernova/Legends|supernova]]. The resultant [[Radiation/Legends|radiation]] required all cities to be completely covered by transparent domes made of [[Neutronium/Legends|neutronium]] alloy. Stripped of its ecosystem, the planet is a barren wasteland. Outside the cities the temperatures ranged from 35 degrees Celsius to as low as 40 degrees below zero.<ref name="S" />

==History==
Demophon was first inhabited by [[Human/Legends|Humans]] "hundreds of generations" before the Galactic Civil War.<ref name="S" /> In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], [[Scientist/Legends|scientists]] projected a supernova forecast for Demophon's [[Star/Legends|sun]] in the near 50 to 75 [[Standard year/Legends|standard years]]. The [[Demophon Council]] made no statement on the findings, representative of the general ignorance of the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] citizens.<ref name="HNN" /> The star finally went supernova late during the Galactic Civil War. The [[Star system/Legends|system's]] population tried to escape the coming cataclysm, but the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] had sabotaged the system's [[Demophon Stellar Monitor Station|stellar observatory]] and it was too late.

It was the headquarters of [[Shankti Drive Works]] and [[TransGalMeg Industries, Incorporated]].<ref name="FOP">''[[The Far Orbit Project]]''</ref>

==Inhabitants==
Demophon had no known native species, and was inhabited primarily by Humans. Most inhabitants were employees of the labs or factories, serving for five-year terms, and a stint working on Demophon looked very good on an Imperial citizen's permanent record. Food, clothing, and shelter were all free to employees, and the pay was high, but there was a cost; life was strictly regimented, with random security inspections, curfews, laws prohibiting gatherings of more than ten persons, and regulations for nearly every conceivable activity.<ref name="S" />

Society was split into three classes. The managerial class was the wealthiest, and included the management [[council]], which reported directly to the Imperial [[Governor/Legends|governor]]. Laborers were the middle class, and while not as wealthy as the managerial class, they were still well provided for. There was also a slave class, the [[Sla Kar]], made up of the poor and criminals and used for heavy labor.<ref name="S" />
